description:
Product Details：

Splendid 3D Air Cushion Design: Our women's self-cleaning comb is designed with a unique 3D air cushion and can also push out the remaining hair on the comb with one button.

Perfect for Caring for Your Hair: With our 3D ultra-soft hair brushes, you will be provided with hair brushes that gently care for your hair, create healthy, shiny hair, and help reduce hair breakage, split ends, and frizz.

Perfect for Massaging Your Hair: With our 3D air cushion massager brush, you will have a hair brush that is good for promoting scalp health and hair growth, and it can help you massage and stimulate your scalp safely.

Non-Slip Handle: Our self-cleaning hair brush is designed with an ergonomic non-slip handle, great for smooth touching and safe holding without edge cuts.

Perfect Gift: This airbag massage comb is an excellent gift for birthdays, Valentine's, Mother's Day, and anniversaries, for your girlfriend, wife, mom, sister, friends, or yourself.

Feature:
Central airbag comb 1 key to clean hair loss
Massage the scalp with a round-head comb

Specification:
Size: 20*9cm
Color: Green/Pink/White
